name: Darren Stralow
background: Mr Stralow is an experienced mining executive and qualified mining engineer with over 20 years’ industry experience. Prior to joining Bellevue, he held several senior roles at Northern Star Resources (ASX: NST), including Chief Development Officer and General Manager of Operations.
